suite.name: TC23 DBTEST

kw.name: Connect To Database
kw.msg: Connect to DB using : pymysql.connect(db='mydb', user=***, passwd=***, host='127.0.0.1', port=3306, charset='utf8mb4')
OperationalError: (2003, "Can't connect to MySQL server on '127.0.0.1' ([WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it)")
kw.doc: Creates a database connection using the DB API 2.0 ``db_module`` and the parameters provided. Along with listed commonly used arguments (`db_name`, `db_host` etc.) you can set any other DB module specific parameters as key/value pairs.
kw.status: OperationalError: (2003, "Can't connect to MySQL server on '127.0.0.1' ([WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it)")

test.name: Create Person Table
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: OperationalError: (2003, "Can't connect to MySQL server on '127.0.0.1' ([WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it)")

test.name: Inserting Data in Person table

kw.name: Disconnect From Database
kw.msg: No open database connection to close
